titleStmt.title: SII 36.298: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 298. (A.R. No. 298 of 1910.) PULIPPARKŌYIL, MADHURANTAKAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the east wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vyāghrapadēśvara temple.

summary.p: (Rishabha, śu., 12, Monday and Sōdhi (Svāthi) = A.D. 1344, May 24, Monday.)

A sarvamāṉya gift of taxes, including taṟik-kaḍamai and pēr-kaḍamai payable by the inhabitants including kaikkōḷar, chāliyar, vāṇigar, chēṉaiyaṅgāḍi, kōyilaṅgāḍi, who settle within the boundaries of the tirumaḍaiviḷāgam of the temple of Tiruppulipagava Nāyaṉār at Pattūr, the northern hamlet of Madhurānthakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Kaḷattūrkkōṭṭam of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, to the temple for conducting worship, festivals and other services.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī cakalalokac cakkaravatti Irācanārāyaṇaṉ campuvarāyaṟku yāṇṭu 6 Āṟāvatu
ṛṣabha nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu dvādaśiyum tiṅkaṭ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa coti nāḷ jayaṅ
koṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattuk kaḷattūrk koṭṭattu śrī maturāntakac caturvvetimaṅkalattu
vaṭapiṭākai pāttūr Uṭaiyār tiruppulippakava nāyanāṟku tirumaṭaiviḷākam pulippakavar koyil
nāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa kaikkoḷar cāliyar vāṇikar ceṉaiyaṅkāṭi koyilaṅkāṭi maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa
puṟakkalaṉaiyum Uṭpaṭa muṉpu Uḷḷa kuṭiyum piṉpu Ēṟum kuṭiyum Ēṟṟikkoṇṭu taṟikkaṭamai peṟkaṭamai maṟ
ṟum Ippaṟṟil koḷḷum palavarikaḷum pala Upātikaḷum Uṭpaṭa Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum tirunāṭciṟappukkum Iṉṉāḷ mutal cantirātittavaraiyum sarvvamāṉiyamāka mutalaṭaṅki Iṟaiyiliyāka kuṭu
ttom §
Digital edition of SII 36.298 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
